productDisplayName: Nike Women Nike Womens Ballista II Silver Sports Shoes
description: Get more comfort and enjoyment out of your fitness training with the nike Ballista 2 running shoes. Packed with performance features, these shoes are a great choice for your daily runs. Attractive and light-as-air, they are a perfect blend of style and comfort, designed to up your performance. Upper Woven mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathabilty and support Extra heel support to lock the backfoot in place and potect it from injuries Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Well padded tongue and lushly-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for breathability and improved ventilation Brand name and logo on tongue Reinforced toe guard nike Swoosh printed behind collar Nike Swoosh appliqued on sides for branding and style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Mesh lining for increased ventilation Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Waffle-pattern grip for excellent traction Scooped heel for extra comfort shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlighte in direct sunlight
